counters.note: KILL ORDER: DTT first. Break the protection engine immediately.
Focus Enoch to stop 'Decay' stacks from ruining your offense.
Requires True Damage to bypass the Clones' high crit avoidance.
Best non-GL bet. Keep Rex alive to feed TM to GAS.
Insta-kill MQG. Do not let his damage ramp.
TRAP: No GAC Omi here. You will get stun-locked and time out.
Nuke Silvano first. Leia's Ult must be used to clear the revives.
Dark Rey provides the anti-revive tech needed for the pirate crew.
Resilient Meditation ignores the Thermals. Very safe.
Whistling Birds bypass Krrsantan's massive defense.
Doom Phalanx first. Their protection-ignoring damage melts Gungans.
Chip the generator while GAS is sitting. Save big hits for when it's exposed.
Reset Juhani's cooldowns. If she can't use her special, the team dies.
TRAP: Wampa has no solo Omi here. She will be slaughtered.
Insta-kill Spirit. Use cleanses to stay above 'Doom' thresholds.
Swipe through the Nightsister revives. High relic check.
Even without Omi, the lead kills them. Use Savage to soak damage.
Echo's daze is the ultimate hard-stop for this team.
STAP's True Damage ignores the massive protection recovery.
Mandalorians outpace the Jedi defensive buffs easily.
